sourcesContent:
import { BottomNavigation, Box, IconButton, Typography } from "@mui/material"


export const Footer=()=>{

    return(
        <footer style={{display:'sticky', justifyContent:'center',marginTop:'16px'}}>
            <Typography variant='h4'>Lets Get in Touch</Typography>
            <Stack direction="row" spacing={1}>
      <IconButton aria-label="delete">
        <DeleteIcon />
      </IconButton>
      <IconButton aria-label="delete" disabled color="primary">
        <DeleteIcon />
      </IconButton>
      <IconButton color="secondary" aria-label="add an alarm">
        <AlarmIcon />
      </IconButton>
      <IconButton color="primary" aria-label="add to shopping cart">
        <AddShoppingCartIcon />
      </IconButton>
    </Stack>

        </footer>
    )
}
